calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 28, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-29-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Lee Batara.
Plaintiff, Hartford Casualty Insurance Co. present by counsel, Alex Gauld.
Plaintiff's witness, Karen Vallaire was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment against defendant, Rolando Gomez as follows: Property damages $8,615.69, Personal injury to plaintiff $7,000.00, Injury to passenger $500.00, costs $176.00 for the total of $16,291.69. Does 1 to 20 are dismissed without prejudice. Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
